title: T-011 — API: Item deactivate (POST /api/technical/items/:item_code/deactivate) with V-TEC-05
prompt: Implement POST /api/technical/items/[item_code]/deactivate per §6.2 and V-TEC-05. Body: { reason: 'discontinued'|'recipe_change'|'d365_mismatch'|'other', notes?: string, target_status: 'deprecated'|'blocked' }. Status transition rules: blocked->active requires owner approval flag (return 403 unless approver field also set). Soft transition only — never DELETE rows. Audit log entry with action='item.deactivate'. Permission gate: technical.items.deactivate. RED tests/api/items-deactivate.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/items-deactivate.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Item deactivate endpoint enforcing reason + audit + status transition rules.
pipeline_inputs.details: Reason enum mirrors UI TEC-081 modal options. blocked->active reverse path requires explicit approver_user_id property and owner permission. Active BOMs referencing this item should not be auto-deactivated.
acceptance_criteria: Given item active, when POST deactivate with reason='discontinued', then status='deprecated' and audit row written.
Given POST without reason field, when validated, then 422 returned.
Given item blocked, when POST to set active without approver_user_id, then 403 V-TEC-05 returned.
Given user without technical.items.deactivate, when POST runs, then 403.
test_strategy: RED tests for each reason path + missing approver case.
